arts.ttl: Roma Preparing for a Busy January to Address Holes
arts.sum: Roma completed a host of moves last summer but are still lacking in some positions, especially after hiring Ivan Juric and switching tactics. Florent Ghisolfi plots to fix things in January. They haven’t been great on the wings. The post Roma Preparing for a Busy January to Address Holes appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
